calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-19-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Feb-08-2021 Continued To Mar-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Lachona appeared by zoom for Frank Scales (Co-Administrator).
Howard Olsen appeared by zoom for Leticia Woods (Co-Administrator).

Mr. Lachona stated that he has a draft of a petition for final distribution, that he is concerned about Mr. Olsen's lack of communication with his office, that a Special Administrator is not warranted and that the creditor's claim was not filed on time. Mr. Lachona also stated that he would like to get Mr. Olsen's cooperation in getting the petition for final distribution filed and the estate wrapped up. Mr. Olsen stated that he agrees that no special administrator is needed, that he has communicated up until December of last year and raised the issue of mediation. Mr. Lachona stated that Ms. Woods was the Administrator of the parents' estate, that there was an order for final distribution in Leticia's parents' estate, that there is not enough money in that estate to pay for attorney's fees and that he believes attorney's fees and interest are fully warranted. The Court stated that the reason the issue of a special administrator was brought up is because it seems like the Co-Administrators couldn't work together, that it would like to get this estate closed and asked Mr. Olsen to step up the communication. Status on close of estate is continued to March 17, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the parties decide to do mediation before that date, they can do a drop off ex parte petition to request it.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Granted Per Written Order
